ddls:
CREATE TABLE "businesses" (
  "business_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each business */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the business contact */,
  "company" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the business */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the business */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the business */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the business */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the business */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the business and its services */,
  "established_date" TEXT /* Date the business was established */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the business logo */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* Links to the business's social media profiles */,
  "services_offered" TEXT /* Detailed list of services offered by the business */,
  "operating_hours" TEXT /* Operating hours of the business */,
  "partnership_ids" TEXT /* IDs of businesses that the business is partnered with */,
  "cross_reference_ids" TEXT /* IDs of related businesses for cross-referencing */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the business owner (foreign key to users) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("business_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_businesses_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_businesses_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for hierarchical categories) */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL to the category icon */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "business_contacts" (
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contact */,
  "business_id" INTEGER /* ID of the business the contact represents */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the contact */,
  "contact_title" TEXT /* Title or position of the contact */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact */,
  "photo_url" TEXT /* URL to the contact's photo */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biographical information about the contact */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* Links to the contact's social media profiles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_business_contacts_business_id FOREIGN KEY ("business_id") REFERENCES businesses ("business_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "business_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "business_id" INTEGER /* ID of the business being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5 stars) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  "review_title" TEXT /* Title of the review */,
  "review_status" TEXT /* Status of the review (e.g., approved, pending, rejected) */,
  "helpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of users who found the review helpful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_business_reviews_business_id FOREIGN KEY ("business_id") REFERENCES businesses ("business_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_business_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., business owner, association member, general user) */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered on the platform */,
  "photo_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's photo */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biographical information about the user */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* Links to the user's social media profiles */,
  "business_id" INTEGER /* ID of the business associated with the user (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_business_id FOREIGN KEY ("business_id") REFERENCES businesses ("business_id")
)

Date the user registered on the platform
Links to the user's social media profiles
ID of the business associated with the user (if applicable)
